missions.title: Chandrayaan-1
missions.description: India's first lunar probe that discovered water molecules on the Moon's surface, making ISRO the fourth space agency to reach the Moon.

missions.title: Mars Orbiter Mission (Mangalyaan)
missions.description: India's first interplanetary mission. ISRO became the first Asian agency and fourth in the world to reach Mars orbit — on the very first attempt.

missions.title: Chandrayaan-2
missions.description: India's second lunar mission with orbiter, lander, and rover. The orbiter remains operational, mapping the Moon's surface with unprecedented detail.

missions.title: PSLV-C37 — 104 Satellites
missions.description: Set a world record by launching 104 satellites in a single mission, surpassing Russia's 2014 record of 37. 101 of them were foreign nano-satellites.

missions.title: Aditya-L1
missions.description: India's first dedicated solar observatory, positioned at the Sun-Earth Lagrange Point 1, studying solar corona, solar wind, and space weather in real time.

missions.title: Gaganyaan
missions.description: India's maiden human spaceflight programme aiming to send a 3-member crew to a 400 km orbit for 3 days, establishing India as the fourth nation with independent human spaceflight capability.

photos.title: Moon's South Polar Region
photos.description: High-resolution image of the Moon's south polar region captured by Chandrayaan-2's orbiter camera, revealing ancient craters and potential water-ice deposits.

photos.title: Mars — Valles Marineris
photos.description: A composite of the Martian surface captured by Mangalyaan's Mars Color Camera (MCC), showing the grand Valles Marineris canyon system.

photos.title: PSLV-C37 Lift-off
photos.description: The historic PSLV-C37 rocket lifts off from the Satish Dhawan Space Centre, carrying 104 satellites into orbit in a single mission.

photos.title: Earth from 36,000 km
photos.description: India's blue marble — a stunning view of the subcontinent captured by ISRO's INSAT-3D meteorological satellite from geostationary orbit.

photos.title: Aditya-L1 Solar Disc
photos.description: India's first full-disk image of the Sun in multiple wavelengths captured by the SUIT instrument aboard Aditya-L1, revealing dynamic solar activity.

photos.title: Chandrayaan-3 Landing Site
photos.description: Vikram lander's touchdown point near the Moon's south pole — Shiv Shakti Point — marking India's historic soft-landing on lunar soil.

videos.title: Chandrayaan-3: Moon Landing Live
videos.description: Watch the live broadcast of Vikram lander's historic touchdown on the Moon's south pole — making India the first nation to land near the lunar south pole.

videos.title: Mangalyaan: Journey to Mars
videos.description: The complete story of India's Mars Orbiter Mission — from launch at SDSC to Mars Orbit Insertion — a 300-day journey covering 680 million kilometres.

videos.title: PSLV-C37: Record 104 Satellites
videos.description: Relive the moment ISRO shattered the world record — launching 104 satellites in a single rocket, demonstrating India's unmatched launch precision.

videos.title: Gaganyaan: India's Human Spaceflight
videos.description: An in-depth look at India's ambitious human spaceflight programme — the crew training, the human-rated GSLV Mk III, and the mission's vision to put Indians in space.
